race.comment: BE MORE PACIFIC (7) is yet to threaten in his two runs back but comes through two strong maidens. Drops back in trip off 36 days and gets the blinkers on. Bold showing anticipated. DANCING TILDA (2) returned from a spell a week-and-a-half ago when finishing sixth over 1420m at Grafton. Is sure to have come on from that and gets in well with the 2kg claim. CLAW MACHINE (1) did well last start but found one better over 1200m at Kilcoy, beaten less than a length after being in contention on the turn. Faces an easier assignment so he is a major player.  Should be able to give this a big shake. TIGERMOTH (6) is another who should find this a bit easier and might be able to sneak a minor spot.
